headline: Sony is killing all physical PlayStation game discs
summary: Sony will cease physical PlayStation game disc production by January 2028. New game releases will be exclusively digital-only thereafter. Games released before this date will still be available on disc.

headline: Google built a great smart speaker, but Gemini isn’t ready for it
summary: Smart speakers are seeking a compelling 'second act' beyond basic functions. Google's new smart speaker hardware receives positive reviews. However, its integrated AI, Gemini, is deemed not yet fully ready.

headline: Rhythm Heaven never misses a beat
summary: Rhythm Heaven is not Nintendo's most prominent or prolific series. A new entry, Rhythm Heaven Groove, is launching on Switch this week. This marks the first new game in the series in over a decade.

headline: Range anxiety
summary: A supercell storm developed quickly over west central Illinois. Multiple quick-forming tornadoes were generated by the system. One tornado directly hit Rivian’s electric vehicle factory.

headline: LEGO Boba Fett Set Announced, for Ages 18 and Up
summary: LEGO has officially unveiled a new Boba Fett buildable model. The set carries an age rating of 18 and up. This suggests a complex or collector-oriented design.

headline: Escape From Tarkov Creator Aims for Most Realistic Sci-Fi Game
summary: The creator of Escape From Tarkov is developing a new sci-fi game. This new project is titled 'Fragmentary Order'. It aims to be the most realistic sci-fi game ever created.

headline: Xbox speeds up Fallout games; dev warns of fatigue, eyes Obsidian.
summary: Xbox boss Asha Sharma is reportedly accelerating development of new Fallout games. A former Bethesda developer warns faster sequels could risk 'fan fatigue.' Speculation arises about Obsidian Entertainment potentially assisting.

headline: Spider-Man: Brand New Day trailer reveals organic webs, Tobey Maguire nod.
summary: A new 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' TV spot has been released. The trailer shows Tom Holland's wrists shooting organic webbing for the first time. It also includes a fun reference to Tobey Maguire.

headline: Woman describes working for Superdry co-founder after rape.
summary: A woman has told the BBC she was raped by Superdry co-founder James Holder. She was working for Holder at the time of the alleged attack. She described feeling dread when returning to her job.

headline: Officers face misconduct probe in Nowak handcuffing death.
summary: Officers involved in the Henry Nowak case are facing a gross misconduct investigation. Henry Nowak, 18, was handcuffed while dying after being stabbed. The incident occurred in December 2025.

headline: Family thanks zoo staff for rescuing boy from crocodile attack.
summary: A boy attacked by a crocodile was rescued by quick-acting zoo staff. His family has publicly expressed gratitude to the rescuers. The boy remains in stable condition at Addenbrooke's Hospital.

headline: Two dead in flight experience plane crash.
summary: A two-seat Cessna plane crashed during a flight experience. The incident occurred off Mill Lane in High Ongar. Two people died in the crash.
